# Sovereignbase

> Sovereignbase specifications and documentation.

This file lists key pages that help language models understand the site structure and important documents.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sovereignbase.dev/): Main site entry page.
- [QR](https://sovereignbase.dev/qr/): Tools to encode information (eg. recovery key) in to QRs. As well as scan and print QRs.
- [Hardware bound package](https://sovereignbase.dev/hardware-bound/): Device bound entropy for zero-knowledge/local-first application cryptographic bootsrap.
- [Convergent Replicated Struct](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-struct/): Convergent Replicated Struct (CR-Struct) specification.
- [Convergent Replicated List](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-list/): Convergent Replicated List (CR-List) specification.
- [Convergent Replicated Text](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/): Convergent Replicated Text (CR-Text) browser demo.
- [Convergent Replicated Map](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-map/): Convergent Replicated Map (CR-Map) specification.
